info.title: Jamendo API
info.description: The Jamendo API provides access to Jamendo's free music catalog, including tracks, albums, artists, playlists, reviews, radio streams, and autocomplete functionality. All content is available under Creative Commons licenses.

get.description: Retrieve a list of tracks with optional filtering, sorting, and search capabilities.

parameters.name: fullcount
parameters.description: Include total result count in response header

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by one or more track IDs

parameters.name: namesearch
parameters.description: Search tracks by name with wildcard matching

parameters.name: imagesize
parameters.description: Album cover image size in pixels

parameters.name: fuzzytags
parameters.description: Fuzzy tag search (OR logic with AND precedence)

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Filter by lyrics language (2-letter ISO code)

parameters.name: xartist
parameters.description: Find tracks similar to an external artist

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free text search across tracks, albums, artists, and tags

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Additional data to include in response

parameters.name: ccsa
parameters.description: Filter by Creative Commons ShareAlike license

parameters.name: ccnd
parameters.description: Filter by Creative Commons NoDerivatives license

parameters.name: ccnc
parameters.description: Filter by Creative Commons NonCommercial license

parameters.name: prolicensing
parameters.description: Filter for tracks available in single track licensing program

parameters.name: probackground
parameters.description: Filter for tracks available in background music program

get.description: Retrieve tracks similar to a given track.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Track ID to find similar tracks for

get.description: Retrieve a list of albums with optional filtering and sorting.

parameters.name: namesearch
parameters.description: Search album by name with wildcard matching

get.description: Retrieve a list of artists with optional filtering and sorting.

parameters.name: namesearch
parameters.description: Search artist by name with wildcard matching

parameters.name: hasimage
parameters.description: Filter for artists with images only

get.description: Retrieve a list of playlists with optional filtering and sorting.

parameters.name: namesearch
parameters.description: Search playlist by name with wildcard matching

parameters.name: access_token
parameters.description: OAuth2 access token for user-specific data

get.description: Retrieve reviews for tracks and albums.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Filter reviews by language (2-letter ISO code)

get.description: Get autocomplete suggestions for artists, albums, tracks, and tags based on a prefix string.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: The string to search as prefix (minimum 2 characters)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per entity type

parameters.name: entity
parameters.description: Restrict search to specific entity types

get.description: Retrieve a list of available radio stations.

200.description: Successful response with radio station data

get.description: Retrieve streaming tracks for a specific radio station.
Retrieve feed data including latest additions and popular content.
Retrieve artists that a user has marked as favorites.
Retrieve albums that a user has marked as favorites.
Retrieve tracks that a user has marked as favorites.

post.description: Mark the authenticated user as a fan of an artist.
Add a track or album to the authenticated user's favorites.
Like a track as the authenticated user.
Dislike a track as the authenticated user.

clientId.name: client_id
clientId.description: Client ID obtained from the Jamendo developer portal

zip.description: ZIP download URL for album tracks

zip_allowed.description: Whether download is permitted by artist

BadRequest.description: Bad request - missing or invalid parameters

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing client_id or access_token
